# Joost Helfers

> Berlin-based creative technologist specializing in AI visual production and technical AI solutions.

## About
Joost Helfers helps agencies, studios, and product teams turn complex AI ideas into campaign-grade visuals, working pipelines, and deployed platforms. Background in architecture and computational design (MSc, DesignMorphine). Now focused exclusively on AI visual production and technical AI solutions — generative pipelines, prompt engineering, and full-stack AI tooling.

## Contact
- Email: mail@joosthelfers.com
- Website: https://joosthelfers.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/joosthel
- GitHub: https://github.com/joosthel

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Next.js, TypeScript, React, Three.js, Tailwind CSS
- AI/ML: ComfyUI, Stable Diffusion, OpenRouter, custom LoRAs, prompt engineering
- Backend: Python, Node.js, API design
- Infrastructure: Vercel, cloud GPU pipelines
- Design: Houdini, Blender, computational/parametric design

## Services
- AI Visual Production — campaign-grade generative imagery and video for brands
- AI Automation & Custom Pipelines — ComfyUI workflows, generative pipelines, agentic systems
- Full-Stack AI Tooling — Next.js apps, TypeScript, Python, API design
- Real-Time & Digital Twin Platforms — React, Three.js, interactive 3D

## Case Studies
- /projects/prompt-engine — Live AI tool for prompt enhancement (Next.js, TypeScript, OpenRouter)
- /projects/ai-video-campaign — AI video production for a global brand campaign (ComfyUI, generative video)
- /projects/ai-pipeline-backend — Custom ComfyUI workflows and segmentation tooling (Python, computer vision)
- /projects/souly-boondawg — Hybrid AI music video production (Stable Diffusion, VFX)
- /projects/inyo-digital-twin — Digital twin platform (React, Three.js, web app)
- /projects/msc-arcadia — MSc computational design research (Houdini, parametric architecture)

- /blog/digital-stoicism — Digital Stoicism
